post.description:
Start a complete provisioning workflow for a router.

This is the main endpoint that initiates the 3-step provisioning process:
1. Connection & Verification
2. Basic Configuration
3. Service Setup (PPPoE/Hotspot)

get.description: Get provisioning sessions with filtering and pagination.

post.description: Create a new provisioning session without starting it.

get.description: Get a specific provisioning session by ID.

delete.description: Delete a provisioning session (only if not active).

schema.title: Response Start Provisioning Session Api V1 Provisioning Sessions  Session Id  Start Post

get.description: Get real-time status of a provisioning session.

schema.title: Response Cancel Provisioning Session Api V1 Provisioning Sessions  Session Id  Cancel Post
Response Retry Provisioning Session Api V1 Provisioning Sessions  Session Id  Retry Post

get.description: Get detailed step logs for a provisioning session.

schema.title: Response Get Provisioning Steps Api V1 Provisioning Sessions  Session Id  Steps Get

get.description: Get executed commands for a provisioning session.

schema.title: Response Get Provisioning Commands Api V1 Provisioning Sessions  Session Id  Commands Get

get.description: Get provisioning templates with filtering and pagination.
Get configuration history for a router.

schema.title: Response Get Router Configurations Api V1 Provisioning Routers  Router Id  Configurations Get

post.description: Restore a router to a previous configuration.

schema.title: Response Restore Router Configuration Api V1 Provisioning Routers  Router Id  Configurations  Config Id  Restore Post
